# Summary / 概述

- What does this change do?
- 这次改动做了什么？

# Why / 原因

- What problem or gap does this address?
- 这次改动解决了什么问题或缺口？

# Scope / 范围

- Files or skill paths changed
- 改动涉及的文件或技能路径

# Verification / 验证

- Commands run
- Manual checks
- Commands 或手工验证结果

# Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable. / 我把改动控制在可评审范围内。
- [ ] I updated docs or metadata when user-facing behavior changed. / 用户可见行为变化时，我已同步更新文档或元数据。
- [ ] I removed secrets, tokens, and local-only data. / 我已移除密钥、令牌和仅本地可用的数据。
- [ ] I checked for nearby files or examples that also needed updating. / 我已检查相邻文件或示例是否也需要同步更新。
